Product Information.Directions for Use: Days 1, 15 Load Then Once Every 24 Weeks; 1st infusion - initiate at 50mg/hr and if no infusion toxicity reaction, may increase by 50mg/hr every 30 minutes; Max Rate 400mg/hr; Subsequent infusions - initiate at 100mg/hr and if no infusion toxicity reaction, may increase by 100mg/hr every 30 min; Max Rate 400mg/hr
